chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No.D — 1735 of 2022. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 31.05.2022. FOR ORDERS ON M.A. 6230/2022. FOR ORDERS ON OFFICE OBJECTION. FOR ORDERS ON M.A. 6231/2022. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. None present. ---- This petition seeks demarcation of agricultural land of atleast more than 20 survey numbers admeasuring 116.34 acres in Deh & Tapo Fatehpur Taluka Tando Muhammad Khan. This exercise cannot be undertaken in these proceedings under Article 199. The petitioner may have written letters to the officials but the exercise could well be undertaken before Civil Court having jurisdiction both pecuniary as well as territorial. Petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE A.
